stemHtml: How do pressure patterns at around 18 000 feet (5500 m) compare to those at the surface?

options.a: The pressure patterns (H or L) can be similar to 18 000 ft, but may also be compensated by differences in humidity.
options.b: The pressure patterns (H or L) can be similar to 18 000 ft, but may also be compensated by high wind speeds.
options.c: The pressure patterns (H or L) can be similar to 18 000 ft, but may also be compensated by differences in temperature.
options.d: The pressure patterns must be different due to increasing temperatures from 18 000 ft altitude to ground level.
